title: chore(deps): bump hono from 4.11.3 to 4.11.4

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): update dependency hono to v4.11.4 [security]

summary: Dependabot PR to bump hono from 4.11.3 to 4.11.4 (a security patch fixing JWT algorithm confusion in JWT and JWK/JWKS middleware). Changes are entirely in pnpm-lock.yaml and the server-adapter package.json. However, the same update was already merged via Renovate in PR #12695 on 2026-02-05, and hono was further bumped to 4.11.9 in PR #13127 on 2026-02-17.
maintainerNotes: This PR is fully superseded. The exact same hono 4.11.4 security update was merged via Renovate (#12695), and hono has since been updated to 4.11.9 (#13127). This PR has merge conflicts and all CI checks are failing (prebuild fails due to conflicts). Safe to close immediately.
